message:
Critical review of CASS Memory System beads

## Summary
Performed deep critical analysis of all 333 beads and identified
12 major issues with the original design. Created 15 new critical
beads addressing fundamental problems and re-prioritized 50+ beads.

## New Critical Beads (P0/P1):
1. Zero-Config Quick Start - Immediate value without setup
2. LLM Cost Controls - Budget limits and local-only mode
3. Implicit Feedback - Auto-mark from session outcomes
4. Starter Playbooks - Pre-built rules for cold start
5. Undo/Rollback - Revert bad curation decisions
6. Decision Logging - Transparency for debugging
7. Privacy-First Cross-Agent - Opt-in with consent
8. Rename toxic→blocked - Better terminology
9. Simplified Diary Schema - Minimal v1
10. MCP Server Priority - P3→P1 elevation
11. V1 Scope Gate - Clear MVP boundary
12. Graceful Degradation - Work when components fail
13. V1 Minimal Command Set - Only 5 commands
14. User-Friendly Error Messages - Actionable errors

## Priority Re-organization:
- Decay beads: P0→P3 (defer to v2)
- Curator beads: P0→P3 (defer to v2)
- Validator beads: P0→P3 (defer to v2)
- Semantic Search: P0→P3 (defer to v2)
- Cross-agent: P0→P3 (privacy default)
- MCP Server: P3→P1 (critical for agents)

## Final Stats:
- P0: 136 beads (v1 critical)
- P1: 115 beads (v1 important)
- P2: 40 beads (nice to have)
- P3: 56 beads (v2/v3 deferred)
